meta.scoring_notes: composite_z is the unweighted mean of four standardised signals: (1) club-centrality (avg of eigen+weighted-degree z), (2) intra-squad familiarity (shared minutes per pair / 1000), (3) shared-club density (inverted -- lower fraction is better), (4) mean observed pair JOI90 across pairs that co-played in our corpus. Nations with <50% of players matched carry low_match_warning=true.
